series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule consists of the results obtained from criminal background check conducted by BCI and other law enforcement agencies for applicants for certificates of finder registration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For background checks that produce no criminal records for the applicant, retain paper copy until approval of application and the issuance of a finder registration to the applicant. For background checks that produce criminal records for the applicant, retain paper copy until the application is denied and the expiration of time of all potential applicant''s appeals has passed., Paper: Shred
